creator: seanmeu@protonmail.com
text:
Installed otter-browser-0.9.99 package using "pkg install" on my FreeBSD 11.1 desktop and tried to run it for first time.  Got the following error message:

% otter-browser
/usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Quick.so.5: Undefined symbol "_ZNK14QWindowPrivate12shareContextEv"
